title: Shamhuwth #8049
definition:
Shamhuth = "desolation"

 1) the 5th captain (of the military divisions) for the 5th month in
    the time of David
    1a) also 'Shammoth' (\\08054\\)
         and 'Shammah' (\\08048\\)

    NASB:  a captain of Isr.
